{{Quote|The Indrexu Spiral? That's a knotty bit of space. It's a swirling maelstrom of proto-stars and dark matter just looking for ships to blow up. Even spacers who make the Kessel Run know better than to try it.|[[Reen Irana]], to [[Mander Zuma]]|<ref name="Scourge (novel)">[[Scourge (novel)|''Scourge'']]</ref>}}
The '''Indrexu Spiral''', also known as the '''Indrexu Nebula''',<ref name="Author's Cut">{{SW|url=news/the-essential-guide-to-warfare-authors-cut-part-3-xim-the-despot|series=Star Wars: The Essential Guide to Warfare Author's Cut|text=Part 3 - "Xim the Despot"}}</ref> and originally known as the '''Ihala Spiral''',<ref name="Xim Week" /> was an almost impassable [[Nebula/Legends|nebula]] in the [[Tion Cluster/Legends|Tion Cluster]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]. The Spiral was composed of proto-matter, gas, [[Comet/Legends|comet]] debris, and [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] fields. [[Starship/Legends|Starships]] wanting to reach the Tion Cluster were required to make a detour.

==History==
{{Dialogue|Indrexu|My name is Hylei Indrexu Cortess, the eighth wife of Xer. I was born and raised a simple Mamzin of Ranroon, though most know me as their Queen—|Xim|A title I gave you.|Indrexu|A title bestowed upon me by my Mamzin sisters upon marriage to my beloved husband, Xer, who was mutilated by this savage here—a father massacred by his own son, right before my eyes!|Xim|You made no complaint when you knelt to my sword.|Indrexu|That is not true.|Shool|The prosecution demands that the defendant refrain from comment until cross-examination.|Xim|There's no need, because there'll be no cross-examination. This trial is a charade. As is she.|Xim|Check the registries. She's not from Ranroon, no Mamzin at all—just some wench my father picked up while philandering in the Ihala.|attr=[[Xim/Legends|Xim]], [[Rexrax Shool|Shool]] and [[Hylei Indrexu Cortess|Indrexu]], in the [[The Cry of the Evocii|third episode]] of the play [[Evocar (play)|''Evocar'']]|src=<ref name="Evocar">{{Hyperspace|url=fans/hyperspace/source/ximweek05/index.html|text=Xim Week: ''The Despotica'' (Part IV: ''Evocar'')|int=Xim Week: The Despotica}}</ref>}}
The Ihala Spiral was renamed Indrexu Spiral in honor of [[Hylei Indrexu Cortess]], the legendary [[Queen/Legends|Queen]] of [[Ranroon]] who heroically [[Battle of Ranroon|resisted]] the invasion of [[Xim/Legends|Xim the Despot]].<ref name="Xim Week" />

At a certain point, a team of [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] hired by [[Mika Anjiliac Chiera|Mika the Hutt]] had to choose between risking an accident at the Indrexu Spiral, or risking the wrath of their employer. They found a [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperspace route]] to go ''through'' the Spiral, although they crashed on [[Endregaad]] in the process, which would eventually led to Mika disappearing.

Mika's father, [[Popara Anjiliac Diresto|Popara the Hutt]], hired an independent group from one of the main powers in the galaxy to find and rescue Mika, and offered the route (which could be sold for at least 50,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]]) as part of the payment.
